# Changing the size of a `highchart` object

Changing the size of a `highchart` object

## Usage

``` r
hc_size(hc, width = NULL, height = NULL)
```

## Arguments

- hc:

  A `highchart` `htmlwidget` object.

- width:

  A numeric input in pixels.

- height:

  A numeric input in pixels.

## Examples

``` r
hc <- hchart(ts(rnorm(100)), showInLegend = FALSE)

hc_size(hc, 200, 200)
```
